formFieldList.label: Limit Rule ID
formFieldList.description: Unique identifier for the spend limit rule (alphanumeric characters, spaces, underscores, and hyphens only)

controlPropertyList.value: Only alphanumeric characters, spaces, underscores, and hyphens are allowed

formFieldList.label: Subject Type
formFieldList.description: Select the entity type to apply the spend limit

formFieldList.label: User
formFieldList.description: Select user(s) to apply the spend limit to

formFieldList.label: User Group
formFieldList.description: Select user group(s) to apply the spend limit to

formFieldList.label: Project
formFieldList.description: Select project(s) to apply the spend limit to

formFieldList.label: Persona
formFieldList.description: Select persona(s) to apply the spend limit to

formFieldList.label: AI Model
formFieldList.description: Select AI model(s) to apply the spend limit to

formFieldList.label: Duration
formFieldList.description: Select the time period for the spend limit

formFieldList.label: Spend Limit Amount ($)
formFieldList.description: Maximum spend amount in USD for the selected duration

formFieldList.label: Action When Spend Limit is Reached
formFieldList.description: Select the action to take when the spend limit is reached

formFieldList.label: Block Clearance
formFieldList.description: Select how blocked requests should be cleared (only applicable if action is Block)
